The Great relexification is a transitionary period of [[2022]] and perhaps onward where phrases in [[Lifeism]] are being refined to a mass audience

==Phase 1==
Phase 1 started in mid 2022 and was mostly based on practical terminology. Avoiding loanwords and coining one's own words. This was mainly to differentiated Lifeism from related religions

==Phase 2==
Phase 2 started in late 2022 and was associated with developing terminology to appeal to a mass audience.

[[Category:History]]
[[sn:Great relexifixation]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
